headline: ServiceNow IBM AI Alliance Targets Legacy Bottlenecks And Valuation Expectations
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) and IBM are expanding their partnership to launch joint AI-focused solutions targeting legacy system modernization, enterprise data governance, and autonomous infrastructure operations. The new offerings are aimed at helping large enterprises address long standing obstacles to AI adoption at scale, including refactoring legacy applications, improving data quality and observability, and integrating end to end automation workflows. These joint solutions are expected to...
